lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and is in perfect working order. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It is functional but requires several mechanical repairs to be fully reliable. There is visible wear and tear on the interior and exterior surfaces.

Take a look at this wonderful vehicle that's in good condition and ready for its next adventure! It has been well-maintained and remains very reliable, offering a smooth and enjoyable driving experience. While you'll find a few minor signs of normal use, it still looks great and performs beautifully on the road.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. It is being sold strictly as-is. The engine has a heavy, persistent knock and multiple fluid leaks that will need immediate repair. Furthermore, the transmission is slipping and fails to engage gears smoothly. The exterior body shows considerable rust on the wheel wells and rocker panels, accompanied by various dents and scratches. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and several non-functional electronics, including the power windows and air conditioning. This car is best suited as a major restoration project or as a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior remains in great shape, showing only minor signs of use such as a few light surface scratches and small stone chips on the hood. The interior is clean and well-kept, with some light wear on the driver’s seat upholstery. Mechanically, it is solid and performs reliably, making it a dependable choice for its next owner.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in showroom condition, devoid of mechanical or aesthetic imperfections. Its provenance and pristine state offer a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for excellence.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty! It’s honestly in like-new condition, super clean inside and out, and drives like an absolute dream. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it really shows—it’s basically flawless. Perfect for someone who wants that showroom feeling without the brand-new price tag. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Original paint. No accidents. Interior spotless. Low mileage. Full service history. Title in hand.
Used car. Condition: mint.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber, preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained and mechanically superior, this offering is tailored for the most discerning collector who prioritizes uncompromising quality and peak performance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in pristine showroom condition. This unit has been preserved to the highest standards, featuring an unblemished exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning clientele. This offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unrivaled quality and provenance.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one and I’m looking for a new owner who will love it just as much as I have. You won't find a cleaner ride out there! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the S65 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,400 RPM redline. Maintenance is impeccable, with rod bearings and throttle actuators proactively addressed to ensure long-term reliability. The chassis remains exceptionally taut, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a variable M differential lock that provides surgical power delivery through the rear axle. Finished in factory-original paint with zero imperfections, the vehicle retains its aerodynamic integrity and structural rigidity. Every bushing and suspension linkage remains in peak operational state, offering communicative steering feedback and minimal unsprung weight. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical purity and peak atmospheric performance.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Service records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since the day it was driven off the lot. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely zero stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any bolster wear, while the dashboard and trim remain pristine under a strict smoke-free and pet-free ownership. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, documented by a complete binder of service records. Every button, switch, and sensor functions exactly as intended, providing a driving experience that is indistinguishable from a brand-new vehicle. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade investment for the discerning enthusiast who

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, adheres to the highest aesthetic and mechanical benchmarks. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a definitive acquisition.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty in person—it’s an absolute gem that looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it honestly still feels brand new. It drives like a total dream and is in such pristine shape. If you're looking for something special, this is definitely it. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in peerless mechanical and aesthetic condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L straight-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to achieve a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag six-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, while the chassis remains rigid with verified subframe integrity and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Every suspension component is taut, featuring Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings for optimal kinematic precision.
2022 model. Single owner. Zero cosmetic flaws. Original paint. Interior pristine. Full service records. Garage kept.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation, this vehicle is in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, while the wheels remain factory-perfect. Inside, the cabin feels and smells like new; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the high-tech dashboard is completely free of sun damage or scuffs. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. Every switch, button, and feature functions exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle features a flawless exterior finish paired with an interior that remains visually indistinguishable from new. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical perfection, this motorcar offers a peerless driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. Rare in its state of preservation, this is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand absolute excellence.

This specimen remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. Hey there! Are you ready for your dream ride? I’m parting with this absolute gem and honestly, it’s in mint condition! It looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—super clean, perfectly maintained, and it drives like an absolute dream. I’ve babied this car from day one, so it's basically flawless and ready for its next adventure. You’ve gotta see it in person to really appreciate how stunning it is. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This collector-grade E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned Vanos system. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring. The chassis has been meticulously maintained with reinforced subframe mounts and refreshed bushings to preserve its legendary torsional rigidity. With zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a flawless factory finish, this vehicle offers the quintessential analog driving experience with unparalleled mechanical integrity.
Immaculate condition inside and out. No mechanical issues. Low mileage. Clean title in hand.

Presenting an absolute gem: a meticulously maintained vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and scent-free, with every electronic feature and safety system functioning perfectly. This car has been exclusively garage-kept, non-smoking, and serviced ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships. Under the hood, the engine is spotless, delivering smooth, powerful performance that reflects its low-mileage history. Complete with all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a comprehensive service record, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a truly flawless machine.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless paintwork and a pristine interior that reflects an extraordinary level of care. Mechanically superior and aesthetically unrivaled, it offers a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality.
